evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Ensure data quality, reliability, observability, and performance
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour signals dominate throughout responsibilities — data quality, CI/CD, testing, observability — with no velocity phrases present; classified as rigour.
evidence.domain_risk: SaaS inflight service management, customer-facing BI products
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Customer-facing dashboards in aviation SaaS carry business decision risk but no financial reporting or regulatory compliance language; classified as moderate.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Own end-to-end data platform using Databricks and Microsoft Fabric
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools appear in responsibilities (Databricks, Power BI, Microsoft Fabric), migration/rebuild work implies existing infrastructure, single engineer owning full stack indicates a small but established data function; classified as mid.
evidence.jd_authorship: Reverse-engineer vendor-built BI solution; Maintain DAX performance and dataset refresh consistency; Build CI/CD, testing, and versioning for pipelines
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Responsibilities are highly specific — named tools with precise application context, migration task, and four-stage hiring process — making Tuesday morning work legible; classified as hiring_manager.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: customer-facing BI products; Enable self-service analytics with governance
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Responsibilities split between customer-facing analytics (commercial) and internal data platform ownership (internal_data) with roughly equal weight; classified as mixed.
evidence.autonomy_level: take end-to-end ownership of our data platform and BI layer
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The phrase 'end-to-end ownership' and 'Design and operate scalable pipelines' place the role as setting technical direction across the full stack; classified as strategic.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Reverse-engineer vendor-built BI solution; Reduce technical debt and rebuild toward clean architecture
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Dominant signal is migrating away from a vendor-built BI solution and reducing technical debt, indicating fix_scale rather than greenfield.

ai_role_quote: Own end-to-end data platform using Databricks and Microsoft Fabric
ai_role_reasoning: Data platform infrastructure role with named tools but no AI capabilities (coding assistants, GenAI, semantic models) in scope.
testing_framing_quote: Build CI/CD, testing, and versioning for pipelines
testing_framing_reasoning: Candidate owns testing implementation with explicit ownership verb ('Build') for CI/CD and testing practices.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: Ensure data quality, reliability, observability, and performance
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Operational reliability concerns (reliability, observability, performance) dominate without regulatory or compliance framing.
